demographics.living_situation: lives independently, alone at home today

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I saw my blood test results and my platelets are dangerously low. My head is throbbing and I am absolutely convinced I am bleeding into my brain.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I looked at my platelet result on the patient portal a couple of hours ago and panicked — my head is pounding and I'm terrified I'm bleeding in my brain and need to know whether I have to rush to hospital.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, right after I looked at my blood results on the patient portal
symptom_narrative.character: a throbbing, tight, band-like headache, with my heart racing and a feeling that I can't catch a full breath
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the fear feels overwhelming — I'm convinced something catastrophic is happening
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across my forehead and around my head, like a tight band
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since I saw the results, coming in waves of panic
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; I keep checking my skin for bruises
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: reading more about low platelets online makes the panic worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: racing heart, fast breathing, a feeling I might have a stroke; I keep inspecting my skin for new bruises or spots
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I tend to worry a lot about my health, but I have not had anything quite like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't concentrate on anything; I've been sitting at my computer researching for hours

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a low platelet count found on a recent routine blood test — I was told it was around 75
past_medical_history.how_managed: just being monitored, no treatment given

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I get very anxious about my health

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spends a lot of time researching health information online; became very distressed after reading about low platelets on medical websites this afternoon

objective_data_offered.value: about 110 beats per minute on my smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: measured during an episode of intense panic, so likely reflects anxiety

objective_data_offered.value: 145/90 on my home blood pressure monitor
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff while very anxious

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing fast and it feels like I can't get a full breath in
I keep checking and I can't see any new bruises, spots or tiny pinpoint red dots on my skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: the patient's own inspection, not a clinician examination
